description: CompositionTeal blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, ribbed neckline that has grey tape detailing on the inseam and slightly distressed look graphic with flock detailing on the chestFittingRegularWash care Machine wash with warm water of 40 degrees Wash inside out with like colours Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron on print If you feel you are a bratty guy, then this round neck t-shirt from mr. men is perfect for you. While the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and dry all day, the slighty distressed look Mr. Mischief graphic will inspire everyone to bring out their baughty side. A great casual wear, this T-shirt looks best with jeans and casual lifestyle footwear.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.1', Shoulders- "
